helper_gate_scope_note: WORKBENCH_SERVER_TEST_FILES intentionally includes pre-existing P3 server shards, agent-key routes, the current root suite, and the two P9 shards; parity counts below cover only the P9 root-to-new-shard migration set.

moved_tests.name: workbench server CLI can seed SQLite from isolated history and snapshot roots
workbench server CLI accepts explicit host and port flags
workbench server CLI fails closed for invalid port
workbench server executes project status continuation next action

workbench server falls back to a governed requirement plan model after timeout
workbench server can apply a supplied plan when retrying failed plan generation
workbench server records plan review decisions
workbench server starts development automatically after plan review approval
workbench server stages resume execution in background without blocking projection API
workbench server completes requirement intake only with verified provider completion authority
workbench server closes requirement when all approved implementation packages finish
workbench server can complete requirement intake through configured governed agent executor
workbench server truncates generated context pack snapshot ids for long projection ids
workbench server only completes verified provider profile with configured executor
workbench next action defaults requirement implementation packages to verified provider execution
